series_metadata.series_title: Boat Registration & Title Deposits, Revenue Transmittals, NSF Checks
series_metadata.series_description: This record series contains records generally associated with registration and title fee deposits, revenue transmittals, and non-sufficient fund (NSF) checks, including, but not limited to: finance reports, check ledgers, county title and lien fee reports, recovered NSF checks, and all correspondence that tracks funds being credited/deposited by Parks and Watercraft offices, independent agents, and lock boxes.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: State-wide financial statement audit and Agency/Department-wide audit are conducted by State Auditor, unless they are scanned and saved in an electronic format. records are scanned and saved in an electronic format, paper copy may be destroyed. ; Electronic: State-wide financial statement audit and Agency/Departmental-wide audit are conducted by State Auditor
